retry_reason: Function returns -EAGAIN when folio size mismatch, indicating a transient condition that may be resolved on retry.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to attach a folio to the filemap for a btrfs extent buffer, involving page cache insert/lock, reuse logic, and freeing old folios. refcount operations (grab_extent_buffer, btrfs_folio_inc_eb_refs) are incidental steps within a larger workflow of page cache management.
judge.retry_reason: Function returns -EAGAIN when folio size mismatch, indicating a transient condition that may be resolved on retry.
